visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with pigtails wearing a red bucket hat and a white long-sleeved top with a black vest is standing in a large warehouse aisle. She holds a large pink display box containing three Godiva chocolate tins. The aisle is lined with high industrial shelves and many similar pink boxes stacked on pallets. (2) The camera zooms in for a close-up of the pink box, revealing three distinct tin designs featuring the Labubu character from Pop Mart in different colors and illustrations. The woman's hands are visible holding the edges of the box. (3) Back to a medium shot, the woman points at the box with one hand while holding it with the other, her facial expression is very animated with wide eyes and a smiling mouth. She makes various hand gestures to emphasize her points. (4) The woman points to her head and then holds up two fingers, gesturing towards the camera as she explains something. (5) She brings the box closer to the camera again to show the Labubu characters on the tins more clearly. (6) The woman continues to talk to the camera, using both hands to point at the different tins within the box while maintaining an energetic and engaging facial expression. (7) Final close-up shot of the three tins inside the box, showcasing the detailed artwork of Labubu characters.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: Godiva & Labubu. [Variety]: 超美鐵盒巧克力. [Subtitle]: 有玩盲盒的人一定會喜歡. (2) [Subtitle]: Labubu. (3) [Subtitle]: 而且之前便利商店有出. (4) [Subtitle]: 所以之前買的人真是太傻了. (5) [Subtitle]: 貴、貴超多. (6) [Subtitle]: 超商一罐賣499. (7) [Subtitle]: 這裡三罐只要. [Variety]: 899元. (8) [Subtitle]: 所以這一罐數學是差了多少. (9) [Subtitle]: 200... (10) [Subtitle]: 等於之前的買2多送1. (11) [Subtitle]: 好市多價格真的很划算. (12) [Subtitle]: 那你們想看我們試吃嗎. (13) [Subtitle]: 想不想知道裡面有什麼口味留言告訴我們. (14) [Subtitle]: 如果你想看我們吃我們就買. (15) [Subtitle]: 它3罐是三種口味哦. (16) [Subtitle]: 嗯 不同口味. (17) [Subtitle]: 那很棒 最重要它是含餡的. (18) [Subtitle]: 含餡的godiva. (19) [Subtitle]: oishi. (20) [Subtitle]: godiva. (21) [Subtitle]: 哎 留言告訴我. (22) [Subtitle]: godiva.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator; 1 blurred person walking in the far background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with her hair in two pigtails, wearing a red bucket hat, a white sweater, and a black sleeveless dress or vest.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse with tall metal shelving units, concrete floors, and large pallets stacked with merchandise. Fluorescent industrial lighting is visible on the ceiling.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice speaks rapidly with an excited tone. Upbeat, mid-tempo electronic BGM plays continuously. Very faint indoor room tone from the warehouse is audible in the background. (2) A bright, high-pitched 'sparkle' sound effect triggers as text graphics appear on the screen. The female vocal pitch remains high and energetic. (3) A male voice briefly chimes in with a lower pitch and calm tone to confirm numbers. The music remains steady in the background with a clear synth-pop rhythm. (4) The female speaker increases her speech rate while discussing the price difference, exhibiting high emotional arousal. (5) Another 'ding' SFX coincides with a visual text highlight. The audio mix remains dominated by the enthusiastic vocal narration and the persistent upbeat music track. (6) Female voice continues to ask questions to the audience, maintaining high vocal valence and confidence. The track ends with the word 'Godiva' spoken clearly over the fading BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Intro -> Price Comparison -> Logic/Calculation -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific Godiva x Labubu chocolate set available at Costco by highlighting its superior value compared to convenience store prices. It uses energetic narration and visual evidence to convince viewers that this is a must-buy deal, concluding with a call-to-action for engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcase, price comparison, and specific brand mentions of Costco and Godiva suggest a promotional intent.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media short-form editing with heavy text overlays and high-energy vocals to maintain viewer attention throughout the product review.
